posts.author: MurrayK (Kari Murray )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi - we are loving the Board Discussion new feature and using it for weekly project updates, can this be made into a widget similar to the Board Updates widget?
We have project dashboards and we would like to have the board discussion (weekly updates) as a widget so we can compare our weekly updates with our quarterly updates that are housed in different boards.
Keeping my fingers crossed!
